Chronic Condition Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Pharmacy Characteristics │ April 2021 │ V 1.1 
11 
PHYSICAL_LOCATION_OPEN_DATE 
LABEL: 
Physical Location of Pharmacy Open Date 
DESCRIPTION: The date the pharmacy opened at this location, as reported by the pharmacy to NCPDP. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: PHYSICAL_LOCATION_OPEN_DATE 
TYPE: 
DATE 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
NCDPD DataQ™ 
VALUES: 
MMDDYYYY (e.g., 11/28/2006) 
COMMENT: 
This variable (the store open date) is missing for 72% of the
